question:
In what location must you keep your shipping papers that describe any hazardous materials?
1) In a locked glove compartment whenever you are out of the vehicle
2) On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle
3)In a fireproof pouch under the driver's seat that you can reach while you are driving
4) In a fireproof pouch under the passenger seat while you are driving
canonical_answer: On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: On the driver's seat whenever you are out of the vehicle
